metadata.description: Short prefix used for resource names, e.g. "wfr-dev".
Container image references (registry/repo:tag). Set after ACR build.

containers.name: api
containers.env: [concat(variables('commonAzureEnv'), createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('apiClientId')), createObject('name', 'OPENAI_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('openaiEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'OPENAI_EMBED_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', parameters('embedDeploymentName'))))]

containers.name: worker
containers.env: [concat(variables('commonAzureEnv'), createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('workerClientId')), createObject('name', 'OPENAI_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('openaiEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'OPENAI_EMBED_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', parameters('embedDeploymentName')), createObject('name', 'OPENAI_CHAT_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', parameters('chatDeploymentName')), createObject('name', 'SOURCES_CONTAINER', 'value', 'sources'), createObject('name', 'SOURCES_BLOB_NAME', 'value', 'sources.yaml')))]
